div.div:
RAG Pipeline
1. SharePoint ingestion from SharePoint
2. Snowpark Python chunking (512 tokens)
3. EMBED_TEXT_1024() → VECTOR column
4. Cortex Search (hybrid keyword+vector)
5. COMPLETE() for answer generation
